couple.brideDescription: A joyful dreamer with a love for quiet mornings, handwritten notes, and the kind of laughter that fills every room she walks into.
couple.groomDescription: A calm romantic with a love for music, open skies, and making every ordinary day feel like something worth remembering.
couple.sectionBody: A warm Telugu celebration of love, family, and the beautiful life that unfolds together.

event.invitationLine: cordially invite you to grace the auspicious occasion of their wedding and be part of an evening filled with blessings, love, and joy.
event.footerNote: శుభాకాంక్షలతో — With love and blessings, we cannot wait to celebrate this beautiful moment with you.
event.countdownTitle: Counting down to the auspicious moment

venue.title: An auspicious evening under the golden mandap
venue.description: Join us at a beautifully adorned mandap for a candlelit Telugu wedding ceremony and a joyful reception, surrounded by marigolds and family blessings.
venue.name: TTD Kalyana Mandapam, Vizianagaram
venue.address: 4C56+H92, Ayodya Maidanam Area, Jonnaguddi Area, Vizianagaram, Andhra Pradesh 535002
venue.landmark: Beside Gurajada Apparao Kala Vedika near SVC Ranjini Theatre Opp to Kota. Valet and guest assistance available at the main entrance.

story.title: From college corridors to a forever promise
story.intro: Their story began as collegemates nearly a decade ago — with familiar smiles, shared classrooms, and conversations that slowly became the best part of each day.
paragraphs: Over the years, friendship turned into trust, trust turned into love, and the ordinary moments of college life became the foundation of a bond that only grew stronger with time.

Now, after around ten years of knowing each other, they step into a new chapter — beneath the sacred mandap, surrounded by family, blessings, and the people who have watched their story become something truly unforgettable.
story.quote: We found forever in a friendship that began years ago.

schedule.title: An auspicious evening of vows and celebration
schedule.description: Join us for a traditional Telugu wedding evening filled with sacred rituals, joyful celebration, and the warmth of family.

events.title: Reception & Dinner
events.details: Welcoming guests with warmth, traditional Telugu hospitality, and a grand celebration dinner surrounded by family and loved ones.

events.title: Sumuhurtham — వివాహ ముహూర్తం
events.details: The sacred Telugu wedding ceremony begins at the auspicious muhurtham. Witness the maalaaveduka (garland exchange), talambralu, and the saptapadi vows under the mandap.

gallery.title: A decade in moments
gallery.description: A romantic collage of memories, togetherness, and the quiet magic of growing alongside each other over the years.

contact.title: We would love to celebrate with you
contact.description: For travel assistance, arrival coordination, or any guest support, please reach out to the wedding hosts. Your presence is our greatest blessing.
